mapper.select: select content_id from t_content_like where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and `status` = 1
select count(1) from t_content_like where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and `status` = 1 limit 1

select
from t_content_like where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and `status` = 1 order by create_time desc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into t_content_like (id, user_id, content_id, create_time, `status`) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into t_content_like
id,
user_id,
content_id,
create_time,
`status`,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},

update t_content_like set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT} where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and `status` = 1

insert into t_content_like (user_id, content_id, create_time, `status`) values
(#{contentLikeDo.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contentLikeDo.contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contentLikeDo.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contentLikeDo.status,jdbcType=TINYINT})
on duplicate key update `status` = values(`status`)
mapper.update:
update t_content_like
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
